name: restaurant managers processing 20–50 sales transactions/week tool
description: For restaurant managers processing 20–50 sales transactions/week, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual spreadsheets and accounting software.
problem_solved: manual reconciliation of sales data leads to cash flow gaps
